title: Bufonia koelzii
taxonomy: Bufonia koelzii is classified within the family of Caryophyllaceae, which includes other flowering plants such as carnations and pinks. This family is commonly known as the carnation or pink family. The plant is further classified within the genus Bufonia, which consists of various species of annual and perennial plants. Bufonia koelzii is native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East and Central Asia. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, which includes all types of plants and ferns.
